operatorPrincipleTitle: The examiner stays focused on clearance decisions.
operatorPrincipleBody: The Operator manages order intake, county follow-ups, document procurement, recording deadlines, certified copy delivery, and client status updates before escalating only the items that need human title judgment.
operatorPrincipleMetricDetail: of order coordination handled without interrupting the examiner.
todaySummaryBody: County requests submitted, certified copies retrieved, client updates sent, recordings tracked, and three title issues escalated for review.

activityFeed.summary: New Full Search 40 Years order opened for ABC Title Agency
Kings County record request submitted for Order RE-2847
Certified copy retrieved and verified for RE-2851
Client status update sent to Flatbush Closing Group
Possible open judgment detected on RE-2854 lien search
Internal note posted: missing authorization required before recording
Client delivery email prepared for certified copy package

leads.next: Verify title company name and borrower details

leads.name: RE-2847 - ABC Title Agency
leads.next: Follow up with Kings County Clerk

leads.next: Confirm index number and decedent name

leads.next: Review C&R search notes before delivery

leads.next: Request signed authorization form before filing

messages.speaker: ABC Title Agency
messages.message: Can you confirm status on the 40-year search for 1457 Ocean Parkway?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: The Kings County request is already submitted. I am following up with the clerk because no record response has been returned yet.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Status update sent + county follow-up task created for RE-2847.

messages.speaker: Examiner
messages.message: Do we have the authorization for RE-2858 filing?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Not yet. I flagged it as required before recording and prepared the client request.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Missing authorization escalated + recording deadline added to calendar.

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Created task: Call Kings County Clerk for RE-2847 record delay.

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Created task: Verify possible judgment match for RE-2854.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Order tasks linked to project stages and due dates.

messages.speaker: Client Runner
messages.message: Certified copy for Goldman Law is in hand.

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Received. I marked RE-2851 ready for client delivery and prepared the email.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Certified copy retrieved, verified, and queued for delivery.

messages.speaker: County Clerk
messages.message: Voicemail left regarding pending document retrieval.

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Logged clerk callback window and updated the client status note.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: County record delay remains open until clerk response is received.

tasks.title: Call Kings County Clerk for RE-2847
Send certified copy package for RE-2851
Review possible judgment match for RE-2854

appointments.title: County follow-up: RE-2847 Kings County Clerk
Delivery deadline: RE-2851 certified copy package

escalations.title: Possible open judgment found
escalations.why: The lien search returned a possible match that may affect title clearance.
escalations.next: Review judgment details before releasing the report.
escalations.draft: We identified a potential judgment match during the search and are verifying whether it attaches to the subject property.

escalations.title: County record delay
escalations.why: Kings County Clerk has not returned the requested document after 5 business days.
escalations.next: Call clerk office and send client status update.
escalations.draft: The county request remains pending. We are following up directly with the clerk and will update you as soon as the record is returned.

escalations.title: Missing authorization form
escalations.why: Recording cannot proceed without signed authorization.
escalations.next: Request signed form from client today.
escalations.draft: We are ready to proceed with recording, but need the signed authorization form before filing can move forward.

demoScenario.title: Operator Review
steps: New order arrives from a title agency
Operator classifies service type and required documents
Examiner only gets notified when title judgment is needed

events.summary: New County Clerk Filing order received
Operator classified order type and opened project
